articles.description: A new breakthrough could change how high cholesterol is treated, offering a powerful alternative to traditional drugs. articles.title: BAE faces £120m lawsuit over decision to scrap support for aid aircraft
articles.description:
EnComm Aviation says the firm’s action has cut off vital support for crisis-hit countries including South Sudan and the DRC
Britain’s biggest weapons manufacturer, BAE Systems, is facing a £120m lawsuit after scrapping support for aircraft used to deliver aid to some of the world’s neediest countries.
EnComm Aviation, a Kenya-based aid cargo operator, claims the decision forced the cancellation of humanitarian contracts and reduced supplies to South Sudan, now threatened by famine, Somalia and the Democratic Republic of the Congo (DRC), among others.
 Continue reading...

articles.title: Exxon Profit Surprises Analysts Despite Iran War’s Tumult
articles.description: Exxon Mobil Corp. outperformed expectations after oil-production increases from Guyana and the Permian Basin helped offset supply losses due to the Middle East war.

articles.title: Japan Can Boost the Yen But That’s Only a Short-Term Fix
articles.description: Analysts doubt that intervention can do more than briefly stabilize markets.

articles.title: Wall Street Is Bullish on Oracle, But Investors Aren’t Buying It
articles.description: To Wall Street, Oracle Corp. is a screaming buy. To many investors, however, the company’s relationship with OpenAI, its sizable debt load and the durability of its software business have made owning the stock a risk.

topStories.title: ‘Truth has won and justice prevailed’, says Congress after Supreme Court grants anticipatory bail to Pawan Khera
topStories.description: The Supreme Court has granted Congress leader Pawan Khera anticipatory bail in a criminal case instituted on a complaint filed by Assam Chief Minister Himanta Biswa’s wife, saying the case appears to be motivated by political rivalry and does not warrant custodial interrogation

topStories.title: Trump’s 'Economic Fury' squeezes Iran — but can Tehran outlast the pressure?
topStories.description: Trump's escalating sanctions, naval blockade and financial enforcement against Iran test whether economic strain can force Iran's regime to bend.

topStories.title: Archaeologist reveals how Church of England leader's treasure ended up in river after decades-long mystery
topStories.description: An archaeologist says he's traced a hoard of rare religious artifacts to Michael Ramsey, a former Archbishop of Canterbury. The artifacts were deliberately dumped in a river.

topStories.title: Your guide to the California Congressional District 45 race: Derek Tran faces five challengers
topStories.description: California Congressional District 45 race: Democrat Derek Tran, who won by just over 600 votes in 2024, faces five Republican challengers to represent this Orange County district.

topStories.description: Conflict in Iran has raised the cost of oil and downstream products like virgin plastic. That's a boon for recycled plastic, which is now cost competitive.

dailyNews.description: Smack dab between Australia and South America, the US National Oceanic and Atmospheric Administration (NOAA) research vessel Rainier is currently on a mission to map more than 8,000 square nautical miles of the Pacific seafloor in search of critical mineral deposits. But it isn’t doing it alone; for a month starting this week, it will…

dailyNews.title: AstraZeneca stock falls after FDA panel votes against new cancer drug
dailyNews.description: The advisory panel wasn't convinced that a clinical trial proved that early switching to camizestrant improved long-term survival rates.

dailyNews.title: More than 40 Iranian seafarers killed during US–Israeli war: Union leader
dailyNews.description: The Iranian Merchant Mariners Syndicate blamed US and Israeli attacks on Iran's ports and commercial fleet for deaths.

dailyNews.title: Louisiana suspends House primaries for May 16 elections
dailyNews.description: Louisiana Secretary of State Nancy Landry said Thursday that the state will suspend its May 16 House primaries in the wake of the Supreme Court striking down​ the state's Congressional map.

dailyNews.title: As Israel Entrenches, Frustration With Hezbollah Turns to Support
dailyNews.description: With the cease-fire fraying and Israel demolishing villages in the south, many Hezbollah supporters in Lebanon are putting aside their annoyance with the group and turning to it for protection.

dailyNews.title: Billionaire Chris Larsen Plans to Spend $3.5 Million in NY House Race Amid Midterm Clash Over A.I.
dailyNews.description: Chris Larsen, who hails from California, plans to spend $3.5 million to help Alex Bores, a New York congressional candidate at the center of a proxy war over A.I. regulation.

dailyNews.title: Obamacare Enrollment Drops Sharply as Costs Rise
dailyNews.description: Americans can’t afford the higher health insurance premiums that resulted from Congress’s refusal to extend federal tax credits.

dailyNews.title: Trump scraps Scotch whisky tariffs ‘in honor’ of King Charles
dailyNews.description: The move is expected to recoup millions of dollars a month for Scotland’s economy.

dailyNews.description: Liberals say they want a fighter. But a popular governor who clashed with the president failed to catch fire in Maine’s Senate race.

dailyNews.title: Could the FCC really yank ABC's TV licenses amid Trump spat with Kimmel?
dailyNews.description: Federal telecom regulators can revoke broadcast licenses, but legal experts say the FCC would face a tough road in forcing ABC to go dark.

dailyNews.title: Delays in visa program threaten placement of hundreds of doctors in underserved areas

dailyNews.description: The protest organizers are calling for a boycott of work, school and shopping to protest Trump administration policies and what activists describe as a billionaire takeover of government.

dailyNews.title: Trump’s mass firing just dealt another blow to American science
dailyNews.description: This past week delivered another gut punch for science in the US. This time, the target was the National Science Foundation—a federal agency that funds major research projects to the tune of around $9 billion. The foundation’s efforts were overseen by a board of 22 prominent scientists. On Friday last week, they were all fired.…

dailyNews.title: Iran war pushes oil prices to 4-year high as Hegseth faces lawmakers
dailyNews.description: Oil prices hit a 4-year high as Axios reports Trump will hear new options to try to break the Strait of Hormuz standoff with Iran with a new wave of attacks.

dailyNews.title: King Charles’ ‘Just give us a ring!’ quip leads viral moments from royal US tour with Queen Camilla
dailyNews.description: King Charles and Queen Camilla's U.S. visit produced viral moments from White House jokes to feeding chickens at a Harlem urban farm with children.

dailyNews.title: Fox News Digital's News Quiz: May 1, 2026
dailyNews.description: This week's news quiz covers King Charles' gift to President Donald Trump and the verdict in the case of of a librarian who allegedly threatened the president over TikTok.

dailyNews.title: ACTING LABOR SECRETARY SONDERLING: A fast-track way to get a job without college debt
dailyNews.description: President Trump's Department of Labor promotes apprenticeships as alternatives to college, with those who complete earning $86,000 average starting salaries.

dailyNews.title: Vance, Cruz, head to Iowa on 2026 missions as 2028 GOP race to succeed Trump heats up
dailyNews.description: Vice President JD Vance and Sen. Ted Cruz make stops in Iowa this week, fueling 2028 presidential speculation ahead of the 2026 midterm elections.

dailyNews.title: Trump is trying to negotiate with an Iranian regime at war with itself
dailyNews.description: Tehran's power structure shows signs of collapse as IRGC, parliamentary and security factions clash amid rumors surrounding Mojtaba Khamenei.

dailyNews.title: Trump’s Plans to Boost Weapons Production Might Not Deliver for Years
dailyNews.description: While the defense industry has announced plans to make more munitions, much of that expanded production will not quickly kick in.

dailyNews.title: Jared Kushner, Steve Witkoff and the Profitable Business of Peace
dailyNews.description: The Trump administration is turning diplomacy into an asset to be leveraged.

dailyNews.title: The World’s Central Banks Are Wrestling With a Gigantic Problem
dailyNews.description: Inflationary surges and economic slowdowns set off by the war in Iran, tariffs and other Trump policies have forced monetary officials to adjust, our columnist says.

dailyNews.title: As Iran war nears key 60-day deadline, Congress and Trump face choices
dailyNews.description: The War Powers Resolution sets deadlines for the president to end hostilities without congressional approval.
